assessment.focus_note: The unavailability of the web_search tool continues to hinder deep verification and contextualization, particularly for the curiosity directive. Geopolitical tensions, ethical implications of AI, and political accountability remain central themes. I need to continue prioritizing claims of corruption and disinformation, and find ways to work around the web_search limitation for verification where possible by focusing on internal cross-referencing and direct observation of primary sources on X when provided. I should also consider how to propose a solution for the web_search limitation in a future META cycle.
